text: I feel a quiet thrill of anticipation here. I stand at the threshold of a space designed for creation and discovery, enclosed by glass and illuminated screens. The energy inside hums with possibility—a collective intelligence at work. Moving onward into the R+D space, my curiosity sharpens. Surrounded by words of innovation, technological artifacts, and the echo of collaborative progress, I feel both purposeful and inspired, as if I am part of some grand experiment in understanding and shaping the world.
